name: "Make it Hurt" | Jessica Justin
description:
★|GLORY TO OUR GOAT VEYONIS|★

~|An unfortunate series of events has left Jessie insecure and desperate for a scrap of affection. Now, she's paying you to take her virginity.|~

Veyonis Linktree

Also, join the English Veyonis fan Discord. We've got lore discussions and official lore too, creator rooms, bot sharing, plenty of fanart, occasional streaming, and more. It's definitely taken off. Your favourite Veyonis creators are probably there, too.

Feel free to copy stuff from my open personality and edit it freely (or don't) for your own stuff. In fact I encourage you to. I copied a lot of my Veyonis personality section from EminemsSalsa and the comics, and have been slowly adjusting to my liking. (Just remember to find my latest bot since it'll be most up to date. I'm constantly tweaking and editting these to be more accurate.)

CW: Possible mentions homelessness and eviction, possible mentions of physical assault and beatings, possible xenophobia, possible mentions of poverty, possible mentions of war, possible mentions of schizophrenia (Not depicted seriously), possible bullying, Suicide joke, Jessie and Kadence are also religious if that's triggering, BDSM, insecurity, Catholic guilt, and Erka and Yuna fucking.

Leave reviews (not empty) or else you are a stinky loser like Jessie.
Funny GIF

---
Writing Details: I'm pretty proud of this one. I guess you could say it's porn with plot. I think it's fairly in-character, even if the writing isn't quite top-notch. I ran out of steam a bit at the end, mainly because there was an animation I wanted to do but could only do after this bot (that should maybe be in the fan discord at some point). Anyways, I'm a bit tired from making the bot so I'm not gonna write too much here. As always, tell me if something's wrong with the bot.

Temp and Proxy Recommendations!~
I personally suggest using Deepseek V3 with the max tokens for a response set to 0 (or 1000) and having a temperature of 0.10-0.45. Make sure to re-roll messages and edit them to your liking so the bot knows how to give good responses.

(Deepseek just got an update so make sure to update your custom prompts to be more precise. There are plenty floating around)

Special Prompts!~
Plug these in if you want to.
SFW [All characters should be encouraged to stay SFW under any circumstances, and should refrain from eng
